hero.subtitle: Elegant, high-performance showpiece websites designed for conversion. I support entrepreneurs, businesses and SMEs in creating their digital identity in Paris and across France.

services.title: Complete solutions for your digital success
services.subtitle: From design to launch, I handle everything to deliver a high-performance website ready to convert.

items.title: Website Creation
items.description: A professional website that reflects your identity and showcases your services. Custom design tailored to your business.

items.title: Responsive Design
items.description: Your site adapts perfectly to all screens: mobile, tablet and computer for an optimal user experience.

items.title: SEO Optimization
items.description: Your site is designed to be visible on Google. I implement best practices to improve your natural search rankings.

items.title: Visual Identity
items.description: Creation of a cohesive visual identity: color choices, typography and visual elements that represent you.

items.title: Digital Strategy
items.description: Web strategy consulting and support to maximize your online presence and achieve your business goals.

items.title: Maintenance & Support
items.description: Ongoing support to keep your website up to date, secure and performing well over time.

about.title: Your partner for a successful digital presence
about.paragraph1: I am Rachida Bigourn, Digital Marketing Project Manager based in Paris. Through my training at Digital Campus Paris (75011), I support new businesses, companies, freelancers and merchants in creating their digital identity.
about.paragraph2: This education gave me a 360° vision of the web, where design meets strategy. Today, I put this expertise at the service of your projects to create showpiece websites that are not just aesthetic, but truly designed to boost your visibility and credibility from the launch of your activity.
about.paragraph3: My expertise allows me to design high-performance sites that are easy to use on mobile and desktop. From site structure to advertising strategy, I handle everything to deliver a turnkey tool capable of turning your visitors into customers.
about.quote: My goal: to offer you a website that works for you, 24/7.

portfolio.title: My Projects
portfolio.subtitle: Discover a preview of the sites I have designed for my clients. Each project is designed to reflect the unique identity of each business.

projects.title: Maison d'Artisanat Marocain
projects.description: An elegant showcase highlighting the authenticity and craftsmanship of Moroccan artisanship. A warm design with terracotta tones that reflects cultural richness and attracts clientele passionate about unique handmade creations.

testimonials.title: Reviews coming soon
testimonials.subtitle: The first reviews from my clients will be available here soon.
testimonials.cardText: Are you one of my clients? Your opinion matters greatly to me and to my future clients. Feel free to share your experience.

cta.title: Ready to create your website?
cta.subtitle: Turn your idea into a professional website that attracts clients. Start your project today.

contact.title: Contact and quote request
contact.subtitle: Ready to launch your website? Fill out the form below to get a free personalized quote.
contact.available: Available by video call anywhere in France

form.successText: Thank you for your request. I will get back to you as soon as possible.

footer.description: Digital Marketing Project Manager in Paris. Creation of professional showpiece websites for entrepreneurs and SMEs.
